surfaces.name: azure
surfaces.notes: Fixture-driven with claimed-live wiring; gated for live tenant smoke proof (issue #3024).

surfaces.name: ci_cd_run
surfaces.notes: Fixture normalizer, reducer correlation, hosted binary, and chart values exist; live target proof for the deployed chart shape is pending.

surfaces.name: gcp
surfaces.notes: Fixture-driven with claimed-live wiring; gated for sanitized live smoke proof.

surfaces.name: kubernetes_live
surfaces.notes: Read-only core resource listing, source facts, and the kubernetesLiveCollector chart workload with in-cluster RBAC exist. The reducer kubernetes_correlation domain and the drift read model (GET /api/v0/kubernetes/correlations, list_kubernetes_correlations) have landed; claim-driven runtime and watch mode remain pending.

surfaces.name: scanner_worker
surfaces.notes: The worker runtime and warning analyzer are implemented and charted; concrete secret/license/source/misconfiguration analyzers stay fixture-proven and off by default until live proof.

surfaces.name: semantic_extraction
surfaces.notes: Optional, policy-gated model-assisted observations emitted as provenance only.

surfaces.name: vault_live
surfaces.notes: Secrets/IAM posture lane; source facts exist, graph promotion gated for issue #25.

surfaces.name: mock-oidc-idp
surfaces.notes: Test-only synthetic OpenID Connect IdP built solely for the #4971 auth E2E stack (docker-compose.e2e.yaml). Deliberately excluded from the released production image; not a production command. Serves a single fixed synthetic identity with no real authentication.
